name: Healing the Paralytic
oracleText: Untap target creature. Remove all damage from it. It gains hexproof until end of turn. Draw a card.
flavorText: "Arise, and take up thy bed, and go thy way into thine house." — Mark 2:11
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Netherlandish 16th Century's "The Healing of the Paralytic" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons identifies the c. 1560 painting as a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Netherlandish 16th Century, The Healing of the Paralytic
classics.sourceNotes: Good old-master composition for the Bethesda healing.
